_meta.grain: one row per developer per day
_meta.description: User daily telemetry extended with inherited daily configuration, derived user-day values, and reserved slice fields for later cohort/scope analysis.

field_categories.flattened_source: Flattened from nested user telemetry objects.
field_categories.context: Injected from query/page/model context, not present in telemetry.
field_categories.configured: Joined from external config or testing inputs.
field_categories.derived: Calculated from source and/or configured fields.

day.purpose: Primary daily key for user-day facts.
day.notes: One row per developer per day.

report_start_day.purpose: Start of the report window carried in the user telemetry payload.
report_start_day.notes: Already present in the user report.

report_end_day.purpose: End of the report window carried in the user telemetry payload.
report_end_day.notes: Already present in the user report.

user_id.purpose: Stable developer identifier at user-day grain.
user_id.notes: Primary user key for later cohorting and drilldown.

user_login.notes: Useful for QA and later drilldown views.

user_initiated_interaction_count.purpose: Raw daily user-initiated interaction count for the developer.
user_initiated_interaction_count.notes: Included because it aligns to enterprise telemetry at aggregate grain.

code_generation_activity_count.purpose: Raw daily code generation activity count for the developer.
code_generation_activity_count.notes: Included because it aligns to enterprise telemetry at aggregate grain.

code_acceptance_activity_count.purpose: Raw daily code acceptance activity count for the developer.
code_acceptance_activity_count.notes: Included because it aligns to enterprise telemetry at aggregate grain.

loc_suggested_to_add_sum.purpose: Raw daily suggested added LoC for the developer.
loc_suggested_to_add_sum.notes: Included because it aligns to enterprise telemetry at aggregate grain.

loc_suggested_to_delete_sum.purpose: Raw daily suggested deleted LoC for the developer.
loc_suggested_to_delete_sum.notes: Often zero in the sample, but should be preserved.

loc_added_sum.purpose: Raw daily added LoC for the developer under Copilot-related flows.
loc_added_sum.notes: Used later for user-level and slice-level LoC contribution calculations.

loc_deleted_sum.purpose: Raw daily deleted LoC for the developer under Copilot-related flows.
loc_deleted_sum.notes: Included because it aligns to enterprise telemetry at aggregate grain.

used_agent.purpose: Flags whether the developer used agent-related functionality on that day/report row.

used_chat.purpose: Flags whether the developer used chat-related functionality on that day/report row.

is_active_copilot_dev_day.purpose: Normalized active-user flag at user-day grain.
is_active_copilot_dev_day.calculation: true if any of user_initiated_interaction_count, code_generation_activity_count, code_acceptance_activity_count, loc_suggested_to_add_sum, loc_suggested_to_delete_sum, loc_added_sum, loc_deleted_sum is > 0, else false
is_active_copilot_dev_day.notes: Lets later scopes compute active users from user-day facts.

is_active_chat_dev_day.source: derived from used_chat and/or chat-related activity
is_active_chat_dev_day.purpose: Normalized chat-active flag at user-day grain.
is_active_chat_dev_day.notes: Initial version can map directly from used_chat.

is_active_agent_dev_day.source: derived from used_agent and/or agent-related activity
is_active_agent_dev_day.purpose: Normalized agent-active flag at user-day grain.
is_active_agent_dev_day.notes: Initial version can map directly from used_agent.

is_active_completion_dev_day.purpose: Flags whether the developer had completion activity on that day.

interactions_day.purpose: Normalized dashboard-friendly alias for daily user interactions.

generations_day.purpose: Normalized dashboard-friendly alias for daily user generations.

acceptances_day.purpose: Normalized dashboard-friendly alias for daily user acceptances.

loc_suggested_add_day.purpose: Normalized dashboard-friendly alias for daily user suggested added LoC.

loc_suggested_delete_day.purpose: Normalized dashboard-friendly alias for daily user suggested deleted LoC.

loc_added_day.purpose: Normalized dashboard-friendly alias for daily user added LoC.

loc_deleted_day.purpose: Normalized dashboard-friendly alias for daily user deleted LoC.

cfg_total_dev_loc_added_day.source: joined from external daily configuration by day
cfg_total_dev_loc_added_day.purpose: Configured daily total developer added LoC inherited by each user-day row for testing mode.
cfg_total_dev_loc_added_day.calculation: Join from daily config table on day.
cfg_total_dev_loc_added_day.notes: Same daily configured value repeats for all user rows on the day.

cfg_time_saved_pct_day.source: joined from external daily configuration by day
cfg_time_saved_pct_day.purpose: Configured daily time-saved percentage inherited by each user-day row for testing mode.
cfg_time_saved_pct_day.calculation: Join from daily config table on day.
cfg_time_saved_pct_day.notes: Same daily configured value repeats for all user rows on the day.

cfg_baseline_hours_per_dev_per_week.purpose: Baseline weekly hours used to convert configured time-saved percent into weekly per-user hours saved.
cfg_baseline_hours_per_dev_per_week.notes: Typically coding hours per developer per week in testing mode.

cfg_workdays_per_week.purpose: Converts weekly per-user hours saved into daily per-user hours saved.

cfg_time_saved_input_mode.purpose: Documents the current estimation mode inherited by user-day rows.

time_saved_hours_per_week_equivalent_man.purpose: User-level normalized weekly equivalent time-saved value under manual daily-percent mode.
time_saved_hours_per_week_equivalent_man.notes: In testing mode, this is the same for all active user-day rows on a given day unless later weighted.

time_saved_hours_day_manual.purpose: User-level daily time-saved value under manual daily-percent mode.
time_saved_hours_day_manual.notes: Summing across active users and days yields aggregate manual time-saved totals.

copilot_loc_share_of_total_dev_loc_day_u.source: derived from user LoC and configured total daily dev LoC
copilot_loc_share_of_total_dev_loc_day_u.purpose: User-day share of configured total developer added LoC.
copilot_loc_share_of_total_dev_loc_day_u.notes: Useful for testing concept visibility before real daily dev LoC is integrated.

org.purpose: Reserved field for organization slice membership.
org.notes: Likely joined from roster, repo ownership, or org mapping later.

repo.purpose: Reserved field for repository slice membership.
repo.notes: May require a different telemetry or attribution join later.

team.purpose: Reserved field for team slice membership.
team.notes: Likely joined from HRIS or team roster later.

manager.purpose: Reserved field for manager hierarchy slice membership.
manager.notes: Optional, useful for org drilldown later.

cohort.purpose: Reserved field for cohort labels such as power users, light users, chat users, or agent users.
cohort.notes: Can be derived later from activity patterns.

language_primary.source: future derivation from nested user-day arrays
language_primary.purpose: Reserved field for dominant language on the user-day.
language_primary.notes: Would be derived from totals_by_language_feature or totals_by_language_model.

ide_primary.source: future derivation from nested user-day arrays
ide_primary.purpose: Reserved field for dominant IDE on the user-day.

feature_primary.source: future derivation from nested user-day arrays
feature_primary.purpose: Reserved field for dominant feature on the user-day.

model_primary.source: future derivation from nested user-day arrays
model_primary.purpose: Reserved field for dominant model on the user-day.
model_primary.notes: Would be derived from totals_by_language_model or totals_by_model_feature.

source_user_row_present.source: derived from existence of user row
source_user_row_present.purpose: Explicit flag that the user-day source row exists.
source_user_row_present.notes: Useful when comparing observed vs expected user-day coverage.

calculation_version.purpose: Version tag for user-day derived logic.

notes.purpose: Freeform notes for caveats, anomalies, or later overrides.
